name: memory-mimir
description: Long-term memory for OpenClaw powered by Mimir (graph + vector + BM25)

apiKey.description: Mimir API key (device key mimir_dev_... or sk-mimir-...). Run 'openclaw mimir init' to get one.

mimirUrl.description: Mimir server URL (leave empty for default)

userId.description: User ID — auto-fetched from API key if left empty

groupId.description: Group ID — auto-fetched from API key if left empty

autoRecall.description: Auto-inject relevant memories before each conversation

autoCapture.description: Auto-save conversations to memory after each session

maxRecallItems.description: Maximum number of memory items to inject per conversation

maxRecallTokens.description: Maximum token budget for injected memories

displayName.description: Display name used in captured conversation messages (defaults to userId)
